name: WMO Convention 1947 (World Meteorological Organization)
summary: The World Meteorological Organization (WMO) is a global supranational meta-framework foundational-WMO-treaty framework adopted by the WMO Convention in Washington DC — structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-meteorology-climatology-hydrology framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IPCC co-parent framework alongside UNEP framework (WMO Convention adopted 11 October 1947 in Washington DC + effective 23 March 1950 + International Meteorological Organization IMO predecessor founded 16 September 1873 in Vienna at First International Meteorological Congress + UN specialized agency from 1951 framework — formal foundational WMO treaty framework establishing comprehensive WMO organisation framework, distinct from rest-of-modern-international-treaty frameworks which operate on different substantive areas, structurally distinctive globally as the only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-meteorology-climatology-hydrology framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IPCC co-parent framework alongside UNEP + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IMO 1873 predecessor framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal World Weather Watch WWW 1963 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Global Climate Observing System GCOS 1992 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Global Atmosphere Watch GAW 1989 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Early Warnings for All 2027 initiative framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 23 March World Meteorological Day framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal State of the Global Climate Report annual framework via 2024 State of Global Climate Report 1.5C-temporary-breach 2024 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Celeste Saulo first female WMO Secretary-General 2024-2025 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Indigenous-Knowledge integration framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-administration-WMO-funding-cuts 2025 framework). The WMO Convention is binding upon 193 WMO member states + territories framework matching UN membership — substantial universal coverage framework. The Convention is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label, though formal WMO Climate Change framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-climate-displacement-of-families framework. The WMO Congress + WMO Executive Council + WMO Secretary-General + WMO Secretariat are the formal WMO bodies; national-level apex courts operate as judicial bodies. The WMO Convention is silent on 'parental alienation' as a statutory label.

statutory_framework.title: WMO Convention
statutory_framework.relevance: WMO Convention adopted 11 October 1947 in Washington DC + effective 23 March 1950 — formal foundational WMO treaty framework establishing comprehensive WMO organisation framework.

statutory_framework.title: Early Warnings for All
statutory_framework.relevance: Early Warnings for All Initiative launched 23 March 2022 World Meteorological Day + target full implementation by 2027 — formal foundational Early Warnings for All framework.

apex_courts.name: WMO Congress
apex_courts.role: Formal supreme decision-making body for WMO.

apex_courts.name: WMO Secretary-General
apex_courts.role: Formal administrative head body for WMO — Celeste Saulo Argentina first female WMO Secretary-General 2024-2025+ framework.

anonymisation_convention: WMO-related communications operate via state-state framework via WMO Congress + Executive Council; individual communications not formally accepted under WMO framework.

key_developments.title: IMO International Meteorological Organization founded
key_developments.description: International Meteorological Organization IMO founded 16 September 1873 in Vienna at First International Meteorological Congress — predecessor framework to WMO.

key_developments.title: WMO Convention adopted
key_developments.description: WMO Convention adopted 11 October 1947 in Washington DC — formal foundational WMO treaty framework adopted.

key_developments.title: WMO Convention enters force
key_developments.description: WMO Convention entered force 23 March 1950 — formal foundational WMO treaty framework operational + 23 March World Meteorological Day framework.

key_developments.title: WMO becomes UN specialized agency
key_developments.description: WMO became UN specialized agency 17 December 1951 by UN General Assembly Resolution 531 VI — formal WMO UN specialized agency framework operational.

key_developments.title: World Weather Watch WWW
key_developments.description: World Weather Watch WWW established 1963 — formal foundational WWW framework operational.

key_developments.title: IPCC established by WMO + UNEP
key_developments.description: Intergovernmental Panel on Climate Change IPCC established 1988 by WMO + UNEP — formal foundational IPCC co-parent framework operational.

key_developments.title: Paris Agreement adopted + WMO-supporting-IPCC-1.5C-framework
key_developments.description: Paris Agreement adopted 12 December 2015 at COP21 UNFCCC + WMO supporting role + IPCC Special Report on Global Warming of 1.5°C 8 October 2018 with WMO co-parent framework — formal Paris Agreement + WMO-IPCC supporting framework operational + 1.5°C temperature-limit framework operational + formal substantial WMO operational climate-services framework affecting subsequent Early Warnings for All 2022 initiative framework.

key_developments.title: Early Warnings for All launched
key_developments.description: Early Warnings for All Initiative launched 23 March 2022 — formal foundational Early Warnings for All framework operational.

key_developments.title: Celeste Saulo first female WMO Secretary-General + State of Global Climate 2024 1.5C-temporary-breach
key_developments.description: Celeste Saulo Argentina became first female WMO Secretary-General 1 January 2024 + State of the Global Climate 2024 Report 1.5C-temporary-breach 2024 framework — formal Celeste Saulo + State of Global Climate framework operational.

key_developments.title: Trump-WMO-cuts + State of Global Climate 2025 + UN80
key_developments.description: Trump-administration-WMO-funding-cuts 2025 + State of the Global Climate 2025 Report framework + UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework — formal Trump-cuts + State of Global Climate + UN80 framework operational.

key_developments.title: Continuing WMO framework + Early Warnings for All 2027 final-year + UN80
key_developments.description: Continuing WMO framework 2026 — continuing Early Warnings for All 2027 final-year framework approaching + UN80 Reform Process 2025-2026 framework continuing + continuing State of the Global Climate Report annual framework + continuing IPCC AR7 cycle context + continuing Celeste Saulo WMO Secretary-General framework + 79 years since 1947 WMO Convention founding + 153 years since 1873 IMO predecessor framework + structurally distinctive globally only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal multi-decade-Early-Warnings-Initiative + Trump-cuts framework simultaneously.

structural_findings: WMO Convention operates a supranational global binding-treaty framework — places WMO Convention in the global supranational-meta-framework cluster.

Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-meteorology-climatology-hydrology framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IPCC co-parent framework alongside UNEP framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-meteorology-climatology-hydrology framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IPCC co-parent framework alongside UNEP + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IMO 1873 predecessor framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal World Weather Watch WWW 1963 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Global Climate Observing System GCOS 1992 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Global Atmosphere Watch GAW 1989 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Early Warnings for All 2027 initiative framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal 23 March World Meteorological Day framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal State of the Global Climate Report annual framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Celeste Saulo first female WMO Secretary-General 2024-2025 framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Indigenous-Knowledge integration framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Trump-administration-WMO-funding-cuts 2025 framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal WMO IPCC co-parent framework alongside UNEP framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IPCC co-parent framework alongside UNEP.

Central jurisdiction of formal WMO Early Warnings for All 2027 initiative framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Early Warnings for All 2027 initiative framework.

Central jurisdiction of formal WMO State of the Global Climate Report annual framework is structurally distinctive globally — only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal State of the Global Climate Report annual framework via 2024 State of Global Climate Report 1.5C-temporary-breach 2024 framework.
193 WMO member state + territory ratification framework is structurally distinctive globally — substantial universal coverage framework.

1873 IMO + 1947 WMO + 1950 entry into force + 1951 UN specialized agency + 1963 WWW + 1988 IPCC + 1989 GAW + 1992 GCOS + 2022 Early Warnings for All + 2024 Celeste Saulo + State of Global Climate + 1.5C-temporary-breach + 2025 Trump-cuts + UN80 WMO-framework-development sequence is structurally distinctive globally.

WMO Convention + WWW + IPCC + GCOS + GAW + Early Warnings for All + State of the Global Climate Report formal septet framework with limited PA-intersection framework via formal cross-border-climate-displacement-of-families framework.
editorial_notes: WMO Convention jurisdiction sidecar — supranational global international-meteorology-climatology-hydrology foundational-WMO-treaty meta-framework (WMO Convention 1947/1950 + IMO 1873 predecessor + UN specialized agency 1951 + World Weather Watch 1963 + IPCC co-parent with UNEP 1988 + GCOS 1992 + GAW 1989 + Early Warnings for All 2022/2027 + State of the Global Climate Report annual + Celeste Saulo 2024 first female SG + 1.5C-temporary-breach 2024 + 23 March World Meteorological Day + Trump-cuts 2025). Only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating on formal international-meteorology-climatology-hydrology framework + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IPCC co-parent framework alongside UNEP + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal IMO 1873 predecessor + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal World Weather Watch WWW 1963 + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal Early Warnings for All 2027 + only modern global supranational binding-treaty framework operating formal State of the Global Climate Report annual + central jurisdiction of formal IPCC co-parent + central jurisdiction of formal Early Warnings for All + central jurisdiction of formal State of the Global Climate Report + 193 WMO member states matching UN membership + WMO Headquartered Geneva + WMO Secretary-General Celeste Saulo Argentina first female 2024 + 1873 IMO + 1947 WMO + 1950 entry into force + 1951 UN specialized agency + 1963 WWW + 1988 IPCC + 1989 GAW + 1992 GCOS + 2022 Early Warnings for All + 2024 Celeste Saulo + State of Global Climate + 1.5C-temporary-breach + 2025 Trump-cuts + UN80 WMO-framework-development sequence.

PA-recognition: silent statutory + no-apex-position + silent regulator. NOTE: WMO Climate Change framework operates limited intersection with parental-alienation framework via formal cross-border-climate-displacement-of-families framework.
